promptContext.title: Printer still unstable after router maintenance
promptContext.description: The latest ticket notes suggest the issue may be network-related, but nothing is confirmed.

comments.content: The team wants an internal draft only and has not confirmed the root cause.

body: The latest comments still point to an intermittent printer issue after the router change, so this draft should stay internal and avoid claiming a completed fix.
nextStep: Confirm whether the router change is related before any operator updates the ticket outcome.
closing: I will keep this as an internal suggestion until an operator verifies the next step.
mustContain: Confirm whether the router change is related
